pages.title: 1010 Halloween
pages.description:
Arrange falling blocks on a compact grid to fit lines without gaps in a Halloween-themed twist. Players place geometric shapes strategically to clear rows and score points, managing space carefully as pieces don’t fall but appear for placement. The challenge lies in planning ahead as the play area fills and shapes vary, with spooky visuals setting the seasonal mood.

Key Features

• Block placement puzzle mechanic  
• Grid-based spatial strategy  
• Progressive increasing difficulty  
• Endless mode for extended play  
• Halloween visual and audio effects
